forager.quadtree

Class QuadTree<T extends QuadTreeElement>

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.quadtree.QuadTree<T>

  • public class QuadTree<T extends QuadTreeElement>
extends Object
    Implementation of the Quadtree datastructure.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected List<T> allEntities
      List of element contained in this cell and all subcell.
      protected Rectangle boundaries
      This node boundaries.
      protected List<QuadTree<T>> children
      List of this node childre, NW, NE, SE, SW
      protected int depth
      Current depth of the tree.
      protected List<T> entities
      List of element contained directly in this cell.
      protected boolean isLeaf
      If the node is a leaf.
      protected int maxDepth
      Max depth of the tree.
      protected boolean split
      If the node has been splited.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      QuadTree(Rectangle boundaries, int maxDepth)
      Create a new QuadTree of a given size.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean add(T element)
      Add a new element to the node.
      void addAll(List<T> elements)
      Add multiple elements to the tree.
      List<T> getPossibleCollisions(Rectangle hitbox)
      Get the list of object who are in the same node as the given hitbox.
      boolean remove(T element)
      Remove an element from the tree;

      • entities

        protected List<T extends QuadTreeElement> entities
        List of element contained directly in this cell.

        protected List<T extends QuadTreeElement> allEntities
        List of element contained in this cell and all subcell.

        protected List<QuadTree<T extends QuadTreeElement>> children
        List of this node childre, NW, NE, SE, SW

        This node boundaries.

        Max depth of the tree.

        Current depth of the tree.

    • Constructor Detail

      • QuadTree

        public QuadTree(Rectangle boundaries,
        int maxDepth)
        Create a new QuadTree of a given size.
        Parameters:
        boundaries - The hitbox of the Quadtree.
        maxDepth - The maximum depth of the tree.

    • Method Detail

      • add

        public boolean add(T element)
        Add a new element to the node.
        Parameters:
        element - The element.
        Returns:
        True if the element has been added, false if it is outside of the boundaries.

      • addAll

        public void addAll(List<T> elements)
        Add multiple elements to the tree.
        Parameters:
        elements - The list of elements.

      • remove

        public boolean remove(T element)
        Remove an element from the tree;
        Parameters:
        element - The element.
        Returns:
        True if an element has been removed, else false.

      • getPossibleCollisions

        public List<T> getPossibleCollisions(Rectangle hitbox)
        Get the list of object who are in the same node as the given hitbox.
        Parameters:
        hitbox - The hitbox.
        Returns:
        The list of object who are in the same node.
